mnemonics: S.P.I.C.E. for Test Components: Security, Performance, Integration, Compliance, Endurance
keyPoints: Security testing validates controls protecting data and systems from threats.
Performance testing assesses scalability, latency, and resource utilization under load.
Compliance testing ensures adherence to regulatory standards like GDPR or HIPAA.
commonMistakes: Assuming the cloud provider is responsible for all security testing.
Testing only in ideal conditions instead of simulating real-world traffic spikes.
Neglecting to test data deletion and retention policy enforcement.
